name: gmail-blade-mcp
title: Gmail
description: Gmail email operations via Google API — search, read, send, threads, labels, drafts, filters. Gemini-powered classification and summarisation.
author: groupthink-dev

env.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
env.description: Google API key for Gemini AI features (optional — classification and summarisation)

setup.help_text: 1. Create a project at Google Cloud Console. 2. Enable the Gmail API. 3. Create OAuth 2.0 credentials (Desktop app type). 4. Download the JSON and save as ~/.gmail-blade/credentials.json. 5. On first run, complete the OAuth consent flow in your browser.
prerequisites: Google Cloud project with Gmail API enabled
